name: When She's Gone
short_description: Point and click adventure of a man left alone during Battle of Britain. When the Manchester Blitz starts over Stockport, he decides to look for his wife and adventure starts.
detailed_description:
When She's Gone is an independent adventure game that takes place amid World War 2. In August 1940, Luftwaffe started their air raid on Britain. Their target was industrial centre, Greater Manchester. The Manchester Blitz brought nothing but devastating outcome that demolished Greater Manchester area. When She's Gone examines the exact period of time with a mysterious journey of local man, Jonathan.

Jonathan finds a note that telling his wife left the house. Bu he doesn't know where she is. He then decides to look for her.

When She's Gone is a point-and-click adventure game that focuses on a mysterious narrative. The story is set in Greater Manchester during the Manchester Blitz. Throughout the events of When She's Gone, Jonathan must find his wife while surviving the shocking air raids. You will embark on a journey to locate the missing wife and endure the dangers of the Blitz. When She's Gone features various historical locations and iconic North West cities, all woven into a thrilling storyline.
